UnitAbilities.Title: Sanguinary Priest
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: The Red Grail
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Gifted Commander
UnitAbilities.Text:
While this model is leading a unit, each time that unit is selected to shoot, select one of the following abilities to apply to ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit until the end of the phase:
	▪ [ASSAULT]
	▪ [HEAVY]
	▪ [RAPID FIRE 1]

UnitAbilities.Title: Embittered
UnitAbilities.Text: The first time an attack is allocated to this model, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, until the end of the battle, change the Attacks characteristic of this model’s Dead Man’s Hand to 12.

Infos.Title: TYCHO
Infos.Text: Your Army cannot contain both Captain Tycho and Tycho the Lost.

Infos.Title: CAPTAIN TYCHO
Infos.Text: Captain Tycho was once one of the Blood Angels’ most gifted commanders, a paragon of every ideal his Chapter held to. It was while fighting countless battles against the Orks on Armageddon that he earned fame and renown, and there that he suffered the wound that changed his life forever.

UnitAbilities.Title: Smoke Launchers
UnitAbilities.Text: The bearer loses the Magna-grapple ability and gains the Smoke keyword.

UnitAbilities.Title: Black Rage
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll. While this model is not within 12" of one or more friendly Chaplain models, it cannot be selected to Fall Back and its Objective Control characteristic is 0.

UnitAbilities.Title: Frenzied Reprisal
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time an enemy unit targets this model, after that unit has finished making its attacks, this model can either shoot as if it were your Shooting phase or fight as if it were the Fight phase.

UnitAbilities.Title: Magna-grapple
UnitAbilities.Text: Add 2 to Charge rolls made for this model if one or more of the targets of that charge is a Monster or Vehicle unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Black Rage
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll. While this unit is not within 12" of one or more friendly Chaplain models, it cannot be selected to Fall Back and the Objective Control characteristic of models in this unit is 0.

UnitAbilities.Title: An Honourable Death in Combat
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, that attack has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability if this unit is below its Starting Strength, or the [SUSTAINED HITS 2] ability if this unit is Below Half-strength.

Infos.Title: DEATH COMPANY
Infos.Text: If a Chaplain model from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a Tactical Squad, it can be attached to this unit instead. If a Character unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a Death Company Marines unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

Units.Name: DEATH COMPANY MARINES WITH BOLTGUNS AND JUMP PACKS

ModelCompositions.ModelName: Death Company Marines with Jump Packs

UnitAbilities.Title: Black Rage
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll. While this unit is not within 12" of one or more friendly Chaplain models, it cannot be selected to Fall Back and the Objective Control characteristic of models in this unit is 0.

UnitAbilities.Title: Berserk Fury
UnitAbilities.Text: You can re-roll Charge rolls made for this unit.

LedUnitNames: DEATH COMPANY MARINES WITH JUMP PACKS

Infos.Title: DEATH COMPANY
Infos.Text: If a Chaplain model from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to Assault Intercessors with Jump Packs or an Assault Squad with Jump Packs, it can be attached to this unit instead. If a Character unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a Death Company Marines with Jump Packs unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

Keywords: Death Company Marines with boltguns and Jump Packs

Options: twin Furioso fist and heavy flamer

UnitAbilities.Title: Magna-grapple
UnitAbilities.Text: The bearer loses the Smoke keyword, but add 2 to Charge rolls made for the bearer if one or more of the targets of that charge is a Monster or Vehicle unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Wrathful Rampage
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model is selected to fight, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if this model made a Charge move this turn on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6+, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: Lord of Slaughter
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

UnitAbilities.Title: Whirlwind of Gore
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model fights, until that fight is resolved, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this model’s Blood Reaver for every 5 enemy models within 6" of this model.

Infos.Title: FLESH TEARERS
Infos.Text: This model is from the Flesh Tearers Chapter, a successor of the Blood Angels. For all rules purposes, it is treated as a Blood Angels model, but cannot be included in an army that includes any other Blood Angels Epic Hero models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Shield of Sanguinius (Aura, Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Adeptus Astartes unit is within 6" of this model, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds and Psychic Attacks.

UnitAbilities.Title: Wings of Sanguinius (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per turn, at the end of your Movement phase, one Psyker from your army with this ability can use it. If it does, roll one D6: on a 1, that Psyker suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2+, select one friendly Adeptus Astartes Infantry unit within 12" of that Psyker and remove the selected unit from the battlefield, then set it up again anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Forlorn Hero
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

UnitAbilities.Title: Black Rage
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll. While this model is not within 12" of one or more friendly Chaplain models, it cannot be selected to Fall Back and its Objective Control characteristic is 0.

UnitAbilities.Title: Death Vision of Sanguinius
UnitAbilities.Text: If this model is destroyed by a melee attack, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, you can roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if the attacking unit contains the enemy Warlord on a 2-3, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds; on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds; on a 6+, that enemy unit suffers D6+3 mortal wounds.

UnitNames: DEATH COMPANY MARINES WITH BOLT RIFLES

Infos.Title: TYCHO
Infos.Text: Your army cannot contain both Captain Tycho and Tycho the Lost.

UnitAbilities.Title: Sanguinary Priest
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Blood Chalice
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1.

UnitNames: VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD WITH JUMP PACKS
LeaderInfo.Description: You can attach this model to one of the above units, even if one Captain, Chapter Master or Lieutenant model has already been attached to it. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.

UnitAbilities.Title: Sanguinary Priest
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Blood Chalice
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1.

Options: Heavy Jump Pack and Mk X Gravis Armour

WargearDefinitions.Key: Heavy Jump Pack and Mk X Gravis Armour
GrantsAbilities: Heavy Jump Pack and Mk X Gravis Armour

Values: VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD WITH JUMP PACKS
DEATH COMPANY MARINES WITH BOLT RIFLES
DEATH COMPANY MARINES WITH JUMP PACKS

UnitAbilities.Title: Exemplar Warrior
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per turn, when this model’s unit is selected to shoot or fight, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time this model makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Conversion Field
UnitAbilities.Text: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

UnitAbilities.Title: Heavy Jump Pack and Mk X Gravis Armour
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 10", its Toughness characteristic to 6 and its Wounds characteristic to 5. Remove the Tacticus keyword, add the Jump Pack, Fly and Gravis keywords, it gains the Deep Strike ability and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Inceptor Squad.

UnitAbilities.Title: Jump Pack
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 12", add the Fly and Jump Pack keywords, it gains the Deep Strike ability and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Assault Intercessors with Jump Packs, Vanguard Veteran Squad with Jump Packs.

UnitAbilities.Title: Mk X Gravis Armour
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 5", its Toughness characteristic to 6 and its Wounds characteristic to 5. Remove the Tacticus keyword, add the Gravis keyword and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Gravis (excluding Fly).

UnitAbilities.Title: Mk X Phobos Armour
UnitAbilities.Text: This model gains the Infiltrators and Stealth abilities, remove the Tacticus keyword, add the Phobos keyword, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Eliminator Squad, Incursor Squad, Infiltrator Squad, Reiver Squad, Scout Squad.

UnitAbilities.Title: Raider-pattern Bike
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 12", its Toughness characteristic to 5, and its Wounds characteristic to 5. Remove the Infantry and Tacticus keywords, add the Mounted keyword, it is equipped with 1 twin bolt rifle in addition to the weapons you choose in the next step, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Outrider Squad.

UnitAbilities.Title: Terminator Armour
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 5", its Toughness characteristic to 5, its Save characteristic to 2+, and its Wounds characteristic to 5. Remove the Tacticus keyword, add the Terminator keyword, it has a 4+ invulnerable save, it gains the Deep Strike ability, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Terminator Assault Squad, Terminator Squad.

UnitAbilities.Title: Adamantine Will
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

UnitAbilities.Title: Astartes Banner
UnitAbilities.Text: Add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in this unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Blessing of the Omnissiah
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Command phase, you can select one friendly Adeptus Astartes Vehicle model within 3" of this model. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds and, until the start of your next Command phase, each time that Vehicle model makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per turn.

UnitAbilities.Title: Litany of Hate
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Narthecium
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, you can return 1 destroyed model (excluding Character models) to that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Rites of Battle
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can be targeted with a Stratagem for 0CP, even if another unit from your army has already been targeted with that Stratagem this phase.

UnitAbilities.Title: Tactical Precision
UnitAbilities.Text: Weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Death Companion
UnitAbilities.Text: This model gains the Feel No Pain 6+ ability, and unless its unit is within 12" of one or more friendly Chaplain models, it cannot be selected to Fall Back and its Objective Control characteristic is 0. Add the Death Company keyword, and change the list of units this model can be attached to: Death Company Marines, Death Company Marines with Bolt Rifles.

UnitAbilities.Title: Death Companion with Jump Pack
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 12", it gains the Deep Strike and Feel No Pain 6+ abilities, and unless its unit is within 12" of one or more friendly Chaplain models, it cannot be selected to Fall Back and its Objective Control characteristic is 0. Add the Death Company, Fly and Jump Pack keywords, and change the list of units this model can be attached to: Death Company Marines with Jump Packs.

UnitAbilities.Title: Hero of the Golden Host
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 12" and it gains the Deep Strike ability. Add the Fly and Jump Pack keywords, and change the list of units this model can be attached to: Sanguinary Guard.

UnitAbilities.Title: Blood Chalice
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Forlorn Hero
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, unless that unit starts the battle embarked within a Transport, models in that unit have the Scouts 6" ability.

Options: Heavy Jump Pack and Mk X Gravis Armour
